comment: Perfect for our choir trip. Four beds were exactly as listed and we walked to the Symphony in twenty minutes. Rosalind was responsive and the kitchen was well stocked for a group breakfast.
Great Cabbagetown find. Quiet street, fast WiFi, plenty of parking for two cars.
Eight of us fit comfortably for a family reunion. Beds were comfortable and the bathrooms had everything we needed.
Loved the neighborhood, only ding was the porch light was out when we arrived. Rosalind fixed it the next morning.
We have stayed at lots of places in Atlanta and this is the one we keep coming back to.
